arts.ttl: How Manchester United should line up vs Rangers in Europa League fixture
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, George Smith, Steven Railston)
arts.sum: Man United play Rangers in the Europa League and here's how our writers think they should line up.

arts.ttl: One change as Joshua Zirkzee call made - Manchester United predicted XI vs Rangers
arts.sum: Man United will be hoping to get back to winning ways when they welcome Scottish outfit Rangers to Old Trafford on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: 'Rabbit in headlights' - Amad's journey from Rangers flop to leading Manchester United revolution
arts.sum: Amad had an unsuccessful loan spell with Rangers but takes on his former club tonight as Man United's most influential player.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals Sir Alex Ferguson phonecalls in bid to solve Man Utd crisis
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has been speaking with Sir Alex Ferguson amid the Red Devils' ongoing struggles this season, with the Portuguese picking up six wins from his first 15 games

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim invites Man Utd's ex-Arsenal wonderkid to first-team setup amid striking woes
arts.sum: Former Arsenal youngster Chido Obi Martin has been impressing for Manchester United's Under-18 team this season and has recently featured in senior team training sessions

arts.ttl: Rangers won't 'park the bus' against struggling United
arts.sum: Manager Philippe Clement will not "park the bus" at Old Trafford as he urges Rangers to "write history" with a first win against Manchester United.

After a late win over Southampton last Thursday, Manchester United were brought back down to earth with a disappointing defeat at home to Brighton on Sunday. Ruben Amorim's side have moved into the t...

arts.ttl: We are maybe worst team in Man Utd history - Amorim
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim calls his side "maybe the worst in Manchester United history," but refuses to change his ideals despite recent struggles.

arts.ttl: Why are Man Utd struggling in Amorim's system?
arts.sum: Match Of The Day 2 pundits Leon Osman and Fara Williams discuss Manchester United's tactical struggles under new coach Ruben Amorim, as well as his stern criticism of his side after a 3-1 loss to Brighton.

arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer latest: Alejandro Garnacho outcome nearing amidst interest from Premier League, Serie A?
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho is reportedly a target for both Napoli and Chelsea amidst speculation that he could leave Manchester United this month, and his exit may be nearing.
